title: React Compiler Analyzer — risk-detection config
description: Configuration for the `analyze --risk-config <file>` runtime-risk heuristics. See the package README ('Compiled but Risky') for rule semantics.

$schema.description: Optional reference to this JSON schema for editor IntelliSense.

selectorHooks.description: Hook names treated as high-confidence external selector hooks (e.g. `useFilteredItems`). A matching `unstable-hook-arg` finding is raised to `high` severity.

selectorHookSources.description: Import sources whose exported `use*` hooks are high-confidence selector hooks (e.g. `@acme/store-hooks`). Any `use*` imported from one of these is treated like a configured selector hook.

storeAccessorPattern.description: Regex source matching store-accessor function names (e.g. `Store$` for `getAppStore`). When set, enables `getXStore().field` non-reactive snapshot detection (`nonreactive-store-read`, `medium`). Omit to disable.

detectGetStateReads.description: Enable detection of imperative `.getState()` snapshot reads (`nonreactive-store-read`, `high`). Default: false.

generic.description: When true (default), the generic `unstable-hook-arg` heuristic flags inline object/array literals passed to any unrecognized `use*` hook. Set to false to flag only the configured `selectorHooks` / `selectorHookSources`.
